entities.large_box: a large toy box at the front of the shelf
entities.hidden_toy: a small music box hidden behind the large box

scenes.title: The Hidden Music Box
scenes.background_prompt: A toy store shelf with various boxed toys arranged in a row, price tags, a 'NEW' sign, and bright store lighting. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A toy store shelf under bright fluorescent lighting. The shelf is packed with large, colorful toy boxes — a robot kit, a board game, and a dinosaur play set — arranged in a neat row. At the front, a particularly large toy box showing a race car set takes up most of the visible space. However, tucked behind this large box, partially hidden and only barely visible at the edge, sits a small ornate music box with a delicate ballerina figure on its lid, gleaming gold hinges, and intricate floral carvings. It looks old-fashioned and precious compared to the modern toy packaging surrounding it. A small 'NEW' sign on a plastic stand sits on the shelf edge. Price tags in yellow dangle from the larger boxes.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place large_box (race car set) at the front of the shelf, taking up most visible space. Place hidden_toy (small ornate music box with ballerina figure, gold hinges, floral carvings) tucked behind the large box, barely visible at the edge.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground of this indoor toy store scene, a polished brown wooden floor features three green oval rugs along the bottom edge, with two additional green oval rugs positioned under the front corners of a large four-tiered wooden bookshelf. On the bottom shelf, from left to right, there is a green box depicting a steam train, a yellow box with a similar train, a brown box showing a small airplane, a blue box with a moon and stars, a green box with colorful building blocks, a yellow box with a small yellow car, another yellow box with blocks, an orange box with a blue and green truck, and a blue box with a white rocket. Moving up to the second shelf from the bottom, the left side holds a green box with a train and a blue box showing a boat on waves. Next to these is an open wooden music box decorated with flowers, which contains a hidden_toy in the form of a small ballerina with brown hair wearing a pink tutu, standing in a dance pose. In the center of this shelf sits a large_box, a brown wooden chest with a green front panel featuring a red and white striped sports car. To the right of the large_box is a yellow box with a brown teddy bear, a green box with a small train, and two green boxes containing building blocks. On the third shelf from the bottom, starting from the left, is a yellow box with a train, a yellow box with a truck, a blue box with a rocket, and a green box with blocks. The central area of this shelf is partially obscured by the large_box below it. To the right of the center are a yellow box with a teddy bear, a yellow box with blocks, a brown box with a teddy bear, and a yellow box with blocks. The top shelf holds two green boxes with trains on the left, followed by a yellow box with a plane, a blue box with a rocket, and another blue box with a rocket. To the right are four yellow boxes with blocks and one brown box with blocks, which has a small green toy sitting on top of it. Small white, yellow, and green labels are attached to the front edges of the shelves below various boxes. The background consists of a light-colored wooden wall where four framed pictures hang: the leftmost shows a boat, the middle-left shows a rocket, the middle-right shows a tree in a field, and the rightmost shows a rocket. Three rectangular ceiling lights are mounted at the top of the scene, casting three distinct cones of light down onto the bookshelf.
